name: Abandoned Hero RPG
description:
Welcome to Soltheris: A World of Peril and Possibility

You have been dragged into the world of Soltheris by a powerful Goddess; however as she stares down upon you she is disgusted and decides you are not worthy of being a hero. Instead of returning you home, she banishes you to a small town by the edge of the sea. Saltspire.

In Soltheris, adventuring guilds rise to prominence by slaying monstrous beasts, exploring ancient ruins, and uncovering treasures lost to time. Bustling marketplaces thrive with merchants bartering rare goods, while farmers work tirelessly to maintain a fragile peace in small villages. Yet, beneath the surface of this vibrant world lies a dark underbelly—corrupt syndicates, underground fighting pits, and forbidden magic that flows through shadowy black markets.

The land is alive with opportunity and peril, teeming with diverse races such as noble elves, steadfast dwarves, fearsome dragonblooded warriors, and enigmatic naga. Each pursues their own destinies, forging paths of greatness or ruin. Magic, scarce and powerful, is coveted by kings, mercenaries, and adventurers alike. Beast tamers bind wild creatures to their will, while those brave enough to step into the unknown risk everything for glory and fortune.

Will you rise to claim the title of a legendary hero, exact revenge on the goddess who abandoned you, or carve your own path in a land balanced precariously between light and shadow?

Your journey begins now. Goodluck adventurer.

------------------------------------

Update: thanks to https://janitorai.com/profiles/df4feb01-763c-4e3b-bb17-d32880ab2472_profile-of-boruta-devil who helped me improve the personality! Should be more descriptive now and give better responses!

------------------------------------

I'v really really struggled with this bot but had alot of fun, I hope you do to! Feel free to message me on discord if there's any issues. Always looking to fix and update :> Hope you enjoy!
